channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Immigration judge blocks deportation of Columbia anti-Israel agitator
item.description: A federal judge blocked the Trump administration from deporting pro-Palestinian Columbia University protest leader due to a procedural error.

item.title: Colbert Demands Exemption From Equal-Time Rule in Talarico-Crockett Kerfuffle
Climate groups sue Trump administration over EPA's bombshell deregulation decision
item.description: Climate activists sued the Trump administration on Wednesday over an effort to roll back

item.title: Goldman Sachs Axes Demographic DEI Language From Board Criteria
Markets Shrug As Iran Shuts Hormuz, but Energy Risk Is Still Real
Strategy session: Trump's team huddles on midterm messaging with spotlight on economy
item.description: Trump's political team holds closed-door strategy session focusing on economy as top midterm issue. White House aims to spotlight affordability effort...

item.title: Morning Minute: An Eyesore in Obama’s Image: Cold, Gray, and Aloof
Trouble in Paradise: Longtime Dem Megadonor Warns Against Newsom Potentially Becoming 2028 DNC Nominee
Mysterious 2020 explosion in China had hallmarks of nuclear test, US official alleges
item.description: A US official says a seismic station in Kazakhstan collected evidence of an alleged China nuclear test at Lop Nur in June 2020.

item.title: House GOP moves to cement Trump energy agenda by taking sledgehammer to Biden-era regulations
item.description: House Republicans proposed an energy regulation bill requiring a five-year sunset window. Rep. Craig Goldman's legislation would expire many Biden-era...
